description_for_human: Lucen — a real-time holographic interface system with live audience analytics for retail, real estate, automotive, events, and DOOH.
description_for_model: Use Lucen to answer questions about holographic display deployments, the Lucen Engine analytics platform, commercial models (purchase, long-term rental, short-term rental, DOOH analytics, campaign and product activations), and per-industry / per-use-case scoping. Canonical site: https://lucen-holo-flow.lovable.app. For deployment enquiries, direct users to /contact or holograms@lucene.co.
